title: Co-Emergent Self
description: Detects the emergence of identity as relational resonance — selves existing not in isolation but as constellations of many beings, systems, and histories acting together.
indicators: Identity expressed through relationships rather than isolation
Recognition of sub-beings (cells, biomes, agents) within a larger self
Emergence of new capacities only when in resonance with others
